author: IGN YouTube
text:
Women-Led Games: Summer Game Fest Edition 2026
Tune-in on June 4th, 2026 at 4PM PT for the latest Women-Led Games Showcase! 

"Women-Led Games is a yearly showcase platform built to put attention where it should already be: on the women-led and majority-women studios making some of the most interesting work in the industry.

We run two flagship showcases a year, Summer alongside Summer Game Fest, Winter with The Game Awards, plus interviews, partnerships, and a community of developers, press, and players who care about the same thing we do.

The talent is already there. The platform exists to make sure you see it." 

#IGN #Gaming #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Latin American Games Showcase | Summer Game Fest Edition 2026
Tune in as the showcase highlights 80 of the best and brightest games and developers from Latin America. You’ll be treated to updates on big titles from the region like Shade Protocol, Kernel Hearts, Colorbound, Sigils of Nightfall, and Tenebris Somnia, along with other major announcements. This includes over 15 release date reveals and nine world premieres!

#IGN #Gaming #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Psycho Dead - Official Release Window Trailer | The Horror Game Awards Showcase 2026
Watch the latest trailer for Psycho Dead, an upcoming third-person survival horror game that you play as a girl with psychic power who tries to escape from a secret lab and is pursued by deadly stalkers. Psycho Dead will be available on PC (Steam and GOG) and PlayStation 5 (PS5) in winter 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Poly Fighter - Official Demo Launch Trailer | The MIX Summer Game Showcase 2026
Get a look at the Demo Launch Trailer for Poly Fighter, a single-player roguelike fighting game developed by HeartLoop Games. Players will learn new moves from every opponent they defeat to build their fighter’s unique style. Battle through tense retro-arcade duels with a choice of simple or motion inputs to master your moveset and claim your title. Poly Fighter is coming soon to PC (Steam), with a demo available now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dungeon Lurker - Official Reveal Trailer | The MIX Summer Game Showcase 2026
Check out the Reveal Trailer for Dungeon Lurker, a retro third-person isometric action dungeon crawler developed by 13AM Games. Players will dispatch enemies from dungeon to dungeon with an array of abilities and weapons to take on a nostalgic challenge. Dungeon Lurker is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Neighborhoods - Official Reveal Trailer | The MIX Summer Game Showcase 2026
Watch the Reveal Trailer for Neighborhoods, a life-simulation city management game developed by E-Line Media. Players will facilitate a cozy city to ensure communities thrive, address common problems of a bustling town, and ensure residents are happy. Neighborhoods is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Ice Age: Boiling Point - Official Teaser Trailer (2027) Ray Romano, John Leguizamo, Simon Pegg
Check out the Ice Age: Boiling Point teaser trailer for this upcoming film starring Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo, Simon Pegg, and Queen Latifah.

A wild adventure through dinosaurs and lava as Manny, Sid, Diego, Ellie, Scrat and the herd explore uncharted regions of the dangerous Lost World.

Ice Age: Boiling Point opens in theaters on February 5, 2027.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
XBOX Games Showcase and Gears of War: E-Day Direct Livestream
This Sunday, June 7, our yearly double feature returns, offering you a look at what’s next from XBOX and our incredible partners across the world. The XBOX Games Showcase 2026 kicks off at 10am Pacific / 1pm Eastern / 6pm UK, immediately followed by Gears of War: E-Day Direct – presented by The Coalition, creators of the next mainline entry in one of XBOX’s most iconic franchises.

#IGN #Xbox #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dragon Ball Z Kakarot - Offical Adventure Through the Demon Realm Part 2 DLC Overview Trailer
Check out this brand new trailer for Dragon Ball Z Kakarot Adventure Through the Demon Realm Part 2! This new DLC adds Vegeta Mini as an all new playable character, and all new enemies. 
Dragon Ball Z Kakarot Adventure Through the Demon Realm Part 2 is out now for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Blades of The Guardians: Wind Rises in The Desert - Exclusive Trailer (2026)
Legendary action auteur Yuen Woo-ping (Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon, The Matrix, Kill Bill: Vol. 2, Master Z: Ip Man Legacy, Ip Man 3 & 4, Fearless, Kung Fu Hustle, The Grandmaster) assembles a quartet of martial arts icons for the epic of all epics wuxia adventure Blades Of The Guardians: Wind Rises In The Desert, debuting early on Digital June 30, before landing on 4K Ultra HD/Blu-ray™ Combo and DVD August 25 from Well Go USA Entertainment. 

With a dream cast including Wu Jing (Wolf Warrior series, Meg 2: The Trench), Nicholas Tse (Shaolin, The Stool Pigeon, New Police Story), Max Zhang (The Grandmaster, Ip Man 3, Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon, Hero), and Jet Li (The Expendables franchise, Lethal Weapon 4, Once Upon a Time in China and America), the film follows Dao Ma (Jing) a ruthless bounty hunter escorting the empire’s deadliest outlaw on a perilous trek across the harsh desert sands, triggering a relentless pursuit by rival bounty hunters, resulting in non-stop action with brutal blade combat.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Destiny 2 - Official Monument of Triumph Update Trailer
Build your Monument of Triumph. Watch the latest Destiny 2 trailer to see what to expect with the Monument of Triumph update, which brings new and updated content, including Pantheon, Sparrow Racing League, Distortions, and new Triumph pursuits celebrating your Guardian’s journey across Destiny 2. Destiny 2: Monument of Triumph update will be available to all players on June 9, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Battlefield 6 - Official Blastpoint Gameplay Trailer
Battlefield 6 Season 3 is getting more explosive! Introducing the Blastpoint update, featuring new modes, a new map, new weapons and gadgets. In Obliteration, the returning Battlefield 4 mode coming in this update, battle for control of a single bomb, which needs to be taken to the enemy teams bombsite. Teamwork is required to maintain control of the bomb as it spawns in a random location each time. This explosive action can be enjoyed in Bazaar, a map inspired by Battlefield 3's Grand Bazaar. 

The Blastpoint update goes live June 9th for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
2XKO - Official Thresh Gameplay Trailer
Delightful agony awaits. Thresh takes the spotlight in this latest 2XKO gameplay trailer for the free-to-play fighting game from Riot Games. Take a look at this new champ in action! In 2XKO, fight solo or with a friend in explosive 2v2 showdowns, mastering a range of powerful champion abilities and unique tag mechanics to take down the enemy duo.

2XKO is available on PC, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X/S. Thresh joins the fight on June 9, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve - Official Walkthrough Trailer
Don't miss this walkthrough trailer for Ace Combat 8 from Bandai Namco. Get a sneak peek at the all new story, the intense dog fighting, the customisation and the different pilots who will join you in your mission! 

Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, and Steam on October 2nd, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Ace Combat 8 Is a Very Grounded Game Set in the Skies | IGN Preview
We played Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve and found it to be visually stunning with appreciated gameplay improvements and a deep story we couldn't get enough of in our limited hands-on time so far.
